experiment: BC v2 — wins-only filter from V6
motivation: v1 lab 5.7% suggested BC was learning V6's losing-game noise too. Filter to V6's winning trajectories only.

vs_v1.interpretation: v2 has lower supervised acc, expected because the dataset is more concentrated on V6's strong-decision regions.

bench_result.delta: +4.7pp (= wins-only filter helped — no more 0% catastrophic matchups), still well below 3-MLP 26.7% and V60 EXT3 20.5%.

submission_decision: SKIPPED. Lab 10.4% would translate to LB ~250 (10.4% × 43 LB/lab%) which is far below our 3-MLP 679.6 ceiling.
next_step: Use BC v2 weights as REINFORCE warm-start — V6 prior in early training may shape later self-play better than from-scratch.
